mapper.sql: SELECT (${rn_top} / (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom})) AS pageNo , (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom}) AS pageSize , totalCount - (rowindx - 1) AS rrowindx , ROW_.* FROM (

SELECT A.rownum_ AS rowindx , B.TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount , A.BOARD_DIV_CD AS boardDivCd , A.BOARD_SERNO AS boardSerno , A.UPPER_BOARD_SERNO AS upperBoardSerno , A.TITL AS titl , A.REG_USER AS regUser , A.REG_DATE AS regDate , A.UPD_USER AS updUser , A.UPD_DATE AS updDate , A.USE_YN AS useYn , A.NTI_YN AS ntiYn , A.RCMD_YN AS rcmdYn , A.RCMD_COUNT AS rcmdCount , A.NTI_STRT_DT AS ntiStrtDt , A.NTI_END_DT AS ntiEndDt , A.ATCH_FILE_ID AS atchFileId , A.HAS_FILE AS hasFile , A.OPEN_YN AS openYn , A.SCRET_YN AS scretYn , A.TEMPCOL_1 AS tempcol1 , A.TEMPCOL_2 AS tempcol2 , A.TEMPCOL_3 AS tempcol3 , A.TEMPCOL_4 AS tempcol4 , A.TEMPCOL_5 AS tempcol5 , A.TEMPCOL_6 AS tempcol6 FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SBM.NTI_YN DESC, SBM.BOARD_SERNO DESC) AS rownum_ , SBM.BOARD_DIV_CD , SBM.BOARD_SERNO , SBM.UPPER_BOARD_SERNO , SBM.TITL , SBM.REG_USER , DATE_FORMAT(SBM.REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS REG_DATE , SBM.UPD_USER , DATE_FORMAT(SBM.UPD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS UPD_DATE , SBM.USE_YN , SBM.NTI_YN , SBM.RCMD_YN , SBM.RCMD_COUNT , DATE_FORMAT(SBM.NTI_STRT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS NTI_STRT_DT , DATE_FORMAT(SBM.NTI_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS NTI_END_DT , SBM.ATCH_FILE_ID , (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM STB_F_ATCH_FILE_DETAIL WHERE ATCH_FILE_ID = SBM.ATCH_FILE_ID ) AS HAS_FILE , SBM.OPEN_YN , SBM.SCRET_YN , SBM.TEMPCOL_1 , SBM.TEMPCOL_2 , SBM.TEMPCOL_3 , SBM.TEMPCOL_4 , SBM.TEMPCOL_5 , SBM.TEMPCOL_6 FROM STB_SM_BOARD_MNG SBM WHERE SBM.BOARD_DIV_CD = #{menuFuncCd} AND SBM.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND SBM.REG_DATE >= CONCAT(#{searchStDt}, ' 00:00:00')
AND SBM.REG_DATE <= CONCAT(#{searchEdDt}, ' 23:59:59')
AND FN_S_USER_INFO(SBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND SBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND ( FN_S_USER_INFO(SBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') OR SBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') )
ORDER BY SBM.NTI_YN DESC, SBM.BOARD_SERNO DESC ) A JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM STB_SM_BOARD_MNG SBM WHERE SBM.BOARD_DIV_CD = #{menuFuncCd} AND SBM.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND SBM.REG_DATE >= CONCAT(#{searchStDt}, ' 00:00:00')
AND SBM.REG_DATE <= CONCAT(#{searchEdDt}, ' 23:59:59')
AND FN_S_USER_INFO(SBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND SBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND ( FN_S_USER_INFO(SBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') OR SBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') )
) B ON 1 = 1
mapper.select: /* on.standard.board.comboard.inqBoardView */ SELECT BOARD_DIV_CD AS boardDivCd , BOARD_SERNO AS boardSerno , UPPER_BOARD_SERNO AS upperBoardSerno , TITL AS titl , CONTENT AS content , REG_USER AS regUser , FN_S_USER_INFO(REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') AS regUserNm , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDate , USE_YN AS useYn , NTI_YN AS ntiYn , RCMD_YN AS rcmdYn , RCMD_COUNT AS rcmdCount , NTI_STRT_DT AS ntiStrtDt , NTI_END_DT AS ntiEndDt , ATCH_FILE_ID AS atchFileId , OPEN_YN AS openYn , SCRET_YN AS scretYn , BLTNB_PSWD AS bltnbPswd , TEMPCOL_1 AS tempcol1 , TEMPCOL_2 AS tempcol2 , TEMPCOL_3 AS tempcol3 , TEMPCOL_4 AS tempcol4 , TEMPCOL_5 AS tempcol5 , TEMPCOL_6 AS tempcol6 , TEMPCOL_7 AS tempcol7 , TEMPCOL_8 AS tempcol8 , TEMPCOL_9 AS tempcol9 , TEMPCOL_10 AS tempcol10 FROM STB_SM_BOARD_MNG WHERE BOARD_DIV_CD = #{menuFuncCd} AND BOARD_SERNO = #{boardSerno}
